generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to be prepared. Did you know that civil defense programs have been proven to reduce casualties in emergencies by up to 40%? Yet, some politicians are cutting these vital programs, claiming they're 'outdated.' But isn't it our duty to protect our communities? Let's not forget the lessons of history. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity #DutyFirst
